title: anisopappus boinensis
intro: Anisopappus boinensis, also known as the African bush tea, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Anisopappus boinensis has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anisopappus boinensis include relief from fever, cough, and cold, as well as its ability to treat skin conditions and wounds. Anisopappus boinensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
